bis_cn_nn.label: Two C,N-chelates + one N,N-chelate
bis_cn_nn.desc: Bis-cyclometalated iridium(III): two κ²-C,N chelating ligands and one κ²-N,N chelating ligand (e.g. [Ir(ppy)₂(bpy)]⁺). Neutral or cationic.

tris_cn.label: Three C,N-chelates
tris_cn.desc: Tris-cyclometalated iridium(III): three κ²-C,N chelating ligands (e.g. fac-Ir(ppy)₃). Neutral or cationic.
